parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "Data Consumer" as Consumer
participant "Data Source" as Source

alt No updates
    Consumer -> Source : [[#1a 1a.]] GET [query URL]
else
    Consumer -> Source : [[#1b 1b.]] POST [base query URL] with
end

alt No updates
    Source --> Consumer : [[#2a 2a.]] search-response Bundle with new records\n(use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
else
    Source --> Consumer : [[#2b 2b.]] Empty search-response bundle
end

opt
    loop
        Consumer -> Source : [[#3a 3a.]] GET [next URL]
        Source --> Consumer : [[#3b 3b.]] search-response with Bundle of next results
    end
end
@enduml
```
